parameters.apprise_url_plus: parseps://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.app_id_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.master_key_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Parse Platform destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise parseps:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Parse Platform push payload delivered straight to your Parse Server.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"where":{},"data":{"alert":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Parse Platform destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Parse Platform push API (no Apprise)

app_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Parse Platform app id

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Parse Platform host

master_key_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Parse Platform master key
